author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Plan: Add gradient bucketing to DDP. Parameters are grouped into ~25MB buckets (configurable). sync_gradients processes buckets independently — in a future overlapped implementation, the first bucket's allreduce can start while backward computes later gradients.

Current sync_gradients flattens ALL params into one buffer. The fix: (1) bucket assignment during DDP::new based on param sizes, (2) per-bucket flat buffer + allreduce in sync_gradients, (3) configurable bucket_size_mb.
